subject: Trigger 1062273: Swift detection of 4U 1700-377
body:
A. D'Ai (INAF-IASFPA), V. D'Elia (SSDC & INAF-OAR),
A. Y. Lien (GSFC/UMBC), K. L. Page (U Leicester), D. M. Palmer (LANL)
and B. Sbarufatti (PSU) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift BAT trigger 1062273 is due to a known source, 4U 1700-377,
being misidentified on board.  This is the result of a known software
limitation and does not indicate that the source is in
an interesting state.
